instruction: Reset the position of the green status dot on the list bullet icon. (subtler offset — read the original coordinates carefully).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/list-bullet.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M8.25 6.75h12M8.25 12h12m-12 5.25h12M3.75 6.75h.007v.008H3.75V6.75Zm.375 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0ZM3.75 12h.007v.008H3.75V12Zm.375 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0Zm-.375 5.25h.007v.008H3.75v-.008Zm.375 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0Z"/></g>
  <circle id="badge" fill="#22c55e" cx="32" cy="104" r="5" />
</svg>
target_svg:
